author: IGN YouTube
text:
Invincible VS - 8 Minutes of The Immortal and Universa Developer Gameplay | Evo 2026
Get a taste of the playstyles of both The Immortal and Universa in Invincible VS before they release on June 30 as the first two DLC characters. This gameplay was recorded by developers at Quarter Up on the showfloor at Evo 2026. 

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Maxell Remix Is the Portable Cassette Deck for the Phone Speaker Generation
Maxell's Remix portable cassette deck does away with some of the most annoying parts of the old-school tape deck experience, namely grinding through AA batteries and catching the headphone cord on things. As far as audio quality, it sounds pretty much how you'd expect from a modern tapedeck, but if you're listening to music on your phone speaker you probably won't even mind.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sony Says It Won't Sell Hardware at a 'Significant' Loss - IGN Daily Fix
Sony has insisted it has no plans to sell hardware at a “significant” loss, with concern growing over the potential price of the PlayStation 6 amid the ongoing RAM shortage. Plus, it has suggested its next-gen console could work like the Nintendo Switch by enabling quote “a seamless experience that can be enjoyed naturally beyond the living room.” Daemon has all that and more in your Daily Fix!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Silver Palace - Official Dichotomy Beta Test Trailer
Don't miss the Dichotomy Beta Test Trailer for Silver Palace, an upcoming open-world fantasy action RPG developed by Elementa. Players will embody a detective seeking answers to the depths of Silvernia's underworld. Explore multiple locales, make use of powerful abilities, and seek the truth at all costs. Silver Palace is coming soon to Consoles, Mobile, and PC with the Dichotomy Beta Test being available now until July 16 on PC.

#SilverPalace #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Virtua Fighter Crossroads - Official Story Mode Overview Trailer
Take a look at the Story Mode Overview Trailer for Virtua Fighter Crossroads, a new entry in the hit action fighting game developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio. Players will get an overview of the game's narrative that sees a cast of characters in Vilasapara on their own story arcs. Virtua Fighter Crossroads is coming soon.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
1666: Amsterdam - Official Gameplay Feature Video
Join co-founder and executive producer Jean-François Boivin for a deep dive into the world of 1666: Amsterdam in this latest video for the upcoming third-person action-adventure game. Learn about the history and world of the Zaindaris, and meet Noa: heir to the Zaindaris line and a Collector in her beginning. 1666: Amsterdam will be available on PC. The prologue is available to play now on Steam and Epic Games Store.

Every 333 years, something stirs. 1666: Amsterdam is a 3rd person Dark, Story-Led, Action-Adventure where Noa, the Collector, wields witchcraft to uncover demonic entities hiding behind human faces. Investigate by day. Face your demons at night.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Division 2 x Dead by Daylight - Official Collaboration Trailer
Take a look at the Dead by Daylight Event Trailer for The Division 2, a third-person action shooter developed by Ubisoft. Players will face the fog to celebrate 10 years of Dead by Daylight with the upcoming collaboration, packed with cosmetics to earn through the Event Pass. The Dead by Daylight Event for The Division 2 runs from June 30 through July 14 on PlayStation 4 (PS4), Xbox One, and PC.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gundam Card Game - Official 1st Anniversary Trailer
Check out the trailer celebrating the Gundam Card Game's 1st Anniversary with some teasers for what's to come!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes - Official German Trailer
Check out the Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes trailer as two iconic worlds are brought together in this collaboration. The new Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes trailer features Daniel Brühl (who plays Zemo in the MCU). In the Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes collaboration, your favorite Earth-based Marvel heroes and villains are now Magic cards you can collect, play, and build around, putting legendary power directly into your hands. Magic: The Gathering x Marvel Super Heroes is available now.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Official PS5 Pro Immersion Trailer
Watch the PS5 Pro Immersion Trailer for Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, the remake of the third-person action-adventure stealth game developed by Ubisoft. Players on PlayStation 5 Pro can enjoy exclusive console features from Ray‑Traced Global Illumination, PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution support, haptic feedback, 3D audio, and more to enjoy this pirate adventure at its finest on console. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is launching on July 9 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Is Gen Atlas a Sci-Fi Shadow of the Colossus?
We saw some brand new Gen Atlas gameplay and spoke to its creator, the legendary Fumito Ueda. Here's everything we learned and our theories about what the director of Ico, Shadow of the Colossus, and The Last Guardian's new game will be about.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Guilty Gear Strive - Official Robo-Ky Starter Guide Overview Trailer
Get a look at the Robo-Ky Starter Guide Overview Trailer for Guilty Gear Strive, the hit action fighting game developed by ARC System Works. Players can get the rundown on the fighter's unique moveset, tactics, and abilities to gain the upper hand in any combat engagement. Learn how to reign supreme as Robo-Ky in Guilty Gear Strive, launching on July 2 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

#GuiltyGearStrive #RoboKy #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
2XKO - Official Lux and Samira: Champions Reveal Trailer
Meet Lux and Samira in this latest 2XKO trailer for the free-to-play fighting game from developer Riot Games (the studio behind Valorant and League of Legends). The new trailer gives us a peek at the new champions in action ahead of their arrival in 2XKO later in 2026. In 2XKO, fight solo or with a friend in explosive 2v2 showdowns, mastering a range of powerful champion abilities and unique tag mechanics to take down the enemy duo. 

2XKO is available now on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S.

#2XKO #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising - Official Id DLC Character Teaser Trailer
Don't miss the Id DLC Character Teaser Trailer for Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising, the hit action anime fighting game developed by CyGames and ARC System Works. Players can catch a glimpse of the next DLC character with Id joining the fight. Id is armed with his Foreboding Blade to take on the opposition with fast hits and powerful attacks. Id is launching into Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising on September 17 as part of the Version 2.60 update for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam).

#GranblueFantasyVersusRising #Id #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Angry Birds Movie 3 - Official Trailer (2026) Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Emma Myers, Rachel Bloom
Parenthood is a game-changer. Watch the trailer for The Angry Birds Movie 3, an upcoming animated film starring Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Emma Myers, Rachel Bloom, Walker Scobell, Danny McBride, Marcello Hernández, Tim Robinson, Anna Cathcart, Maitreyi Ramakrishnan, Nikki Glaser, MrBeast, Salish Matter, Psalm West, Sam Richardson, James Austin Johnson with Lily James and Keke Palmer.

This holiday season, one angry bird will face his greatest challenge yet, surviving fatherhood… while saving the world!

Executive producers of The Angry Birds Movie 3 are Louis Koo, Toru Nakahara, Ben Mattes, Hanna Valkeapää-Nokkala, Crosby Clyse, Chris Pflug, Simon Hedges, Christopher Milburn, Jamey Heath, Paul Kang, Geneva Wasserman, and Cathy Boxall. The Angry Birds Movie 3 is produced by John Cohen, Dan Chuba, Carla Connor, and Namit Malhotra. The screenplay is by Thurop Van Orman.

The Angry Birds Movie 3, directed by John Rice, opens in theaters on December 23, 2026.

#TheAngryBirdsMovie3 #AngryBirds #IGN
